---
title: "Project 2"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Dirty Dataset to practice Data Cleaning

First I plan to clean the data set by dropping the empty column or rows and standardizing the Punctuation of all column names. Then I'll use the pivot_longer in R to make transform from wide to long. 

## Mental Health Data
First thing I would do address the month column Jan through may. At first glance months like February are just filled with empty values and none of the columns seem

## Tracking Global CO2 Emissions (1990-2023) 
I will use janitor::clean_names() to ensure the columns are correct. Then I'll use pivot_longer() to transform the data from wide to long
